methodology.label: Methodology / lifecycle
methodology.description: where in the model's lifecycle the paper's primary technical work acts

children.label: Pretraining intervention
children.description: Acts during pretraining / base-model creation: pretraining data curation, pretraining objectives, base-model architecture.

children.label: Training intervention
children.description: Acts during the main supervised training run: training objectives, optimization, training-time defenses.

children.label: Adversarial Robustness Training
children.description: Training methods that defend against adversarial attacks through adversarial examples, perturbations, and adaptive attacks.

children.label: Reinforcement Learning Alignment
children.description: RL-based training approaches for aligning model behavior with human values, including RLHF, reward modeling, and preference learning.

children.label: Safety Policy Learning
children.description: Training methods for learning safety-critical policies in embodied agents, robotics, and physical systems through safe exploration.

children.label: Interpretability During Training
children.description: Methods to understand, diagnose, and correct model behavior during training to detect shortcuts, reward hacking, and misalignment.

children.label: Curriculum and Adaptive Training
children.description: Training strategies using curriculum learning, adaptive sampling, and progressive difficulty to improve learning efficiency and robustness.

children.label: Jailbreak and Content Safety Training
children.description: Training approaches to defend against prompt injection, jailbreaks, toxicity, and harmful content through defensive fine-tuning and classification.

children.label: Worst-Case Robustness Training
children.description: Training methods designed for distributional robustness and worst-case performance guarantees, including robust optimization approaches.

children.label: Reasoning-Guided Training
children.description: Training methods that incorporate reasoning, verification, or problem-solving feedback to improve task alignment and output quality.

children.label: Post-training intervention

children.label: Unlearning & Data Erasure

children.label: Trade-off & Multi-Objective Unlearning

children.label: Concept & Class-Level Erasure
children.description: Approaches for erasing higher-level concepts, classes, or disease/identity information from model representations.

children.label: Backdoor & Safety Sanitization

children.label: Verification, Auditing & Evaluation

children.label: Theoretical Guarantees & Bounds
